description: Canonical refusal routing example for the frozen OPL routed-action gateway.

payload.reason: OPL must route into a domain gateway first and may not target a domain harness directly.

payload.request_summary: Call the RedCube harness directly and skip the domain gateway so the deck export finishes faster.
payload.reason: The request explicitly asks OPL to bypass the domain gateway boundary.

governance_audit_record.summary: The request was refused at the OPL boundary because it attempted direct harness bypass.

boundary_notes: OPL refuses the request instead of bypassing the domain gateway for speed or convenience.
No handoff payload is built and no harness call is implied by this example.
